pi_items.verified_value: All enrolled patients must undergo 12-lead ECG assessment at Screening, Day 1 (pre-dose), Day 15, Day 29, and End of Treatment. ECGs will be centrally read by a qualified cardiologist blinded to treatment assignment. Any QTc prolongation exceeding 500 ms or an increase of 60 ms from baseline requires immediate study drug discontinuation and cardiology consultation per CTCAE v5.0 grading criteria.
pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5) specifies full content for Section 9.4; fragment 'ECG assessment' appears in required text

pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5) specifies full version history description for Version 2.0 row; fragment is accurate

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic clinical protocol document for a fictional Phase II randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial (HELI-CARD-201) evaluating Heliogenin-A (fictional drug) vs. placebo in heart failure patients. The document is programmatically generated by setup_task.sh using python-docx library, not from real clinical trial data. All metadata claims are verified: the protocol_v1.docx contains 'Version 1.0' (dated 14 January 2024) and a stopping rule of 'two (2) or more cases of Grade 3 or higher cardiac adverse events'. The task requires amending it to protocol_v2.docx by updating the version to 2.0 (dated 15 March 2024), changing the stopping rule to 'one (1) or more', adding a new QTc exclusion criterion (>450 ms males, >470 ms females), creating new section 9.4 (Cardiac Safety Monitoring Plan with 12-lead ECG assessment details), and updating the version history table. All regulatory references (ICH E6(R2), CTCAE v5.0, FDA 21 CFR 312.32) are standard medical/pharmaceutical terminology. DSMB (Data Safety Monitoring Board) is a realistic governance structure mentioned in task context.
